optoICCSdk.registers.icc_registers.ICCTemperatureManager Class Reference

Detailed Description

Device Functionality - Device Temperature Readout
System ID: 0x22

* | Address | Name                                      | Default | Description     | Type  | Access
* |---------|-------------------------------------------|---------|-----------------|-------|-----------
* | 0x2200  | Device temperature                        | N/A     | Degrees Celsius | uint8 | read only
* | 0x2201  | Device temperature threshold              | 80      | Degrees Celsius. If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again | uint8 | read write
* | 0x2202  | Driver output stage temperature           | N/A     | Degrees Celsius | uint32 | read only
* | 0x2203  | Driver output stage temperature threshold | 80      | Degrees Celsius. If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again | uint32 | read/write
* | 0x2204  | Driver power supply temperature           | N/A     | Degrees Celsius | uint8 | read only
* | 0x2205  | Driver power supply temperature threshold | 80      | Degrees Celsius. If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again | uint8 | read write

Constructor & Destructor Documentation

Member Function Documentation

◆ help()

def optoICCSdk.registers.icc_registers.ICCTemperatureManager.help ( )
static

◆ GetDeviceTemperature()

def optoICCSdk.registers.icc_registers.ICCTemperatureManager.GetDeviceTemperature (   self)

Gets actual device temperature of the active channel.

Active cahnnel is set by 'Status.SetDeviceEEPROMactiveChannel(channel_index)'. This temperature can be also obtained by channel's TemperatureManager 'Channel_0.TemperatureManager.GetDeviceTemperature()'

◆ GetDeviceTemperatureThreshold()

def optoICCSdk.registers.icc_registers.ICCTemperatureManager.GetDeviceTemperatureThreshold (   self)

Gets device temperature threshold of the active channel.

Active cahnnel is set by 'Status.SetDeviceEEPROMactiveChannel(channel_index)'. If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again. This temperature threshold can be also obtained by channel's TemperatureManager 'Channel_0.TemperatureManager.GetDeviceTemperatureThreshold()'

◆ SetDeviceTemperatureThreshold()

def optoICCSdk.registers.icc_registers.ICCTemperatureManager.SetDeviceTemperatureThreshold (   self,
  threshold = 0 
)

Sets device temperature threshold of the active channel.

Active cahnnel is set by 'Status.SetDeviceEEPROMactiveChannel(channel_index)'. If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again. This temperature threshold can be also obtained by channel's TemperatureManager 'Channel_0.TemperatureManager.GetDeviceTemperatureThreshold()'

◆ GetBoardOutTemperature()

def optoICCSdk.registers.icc_registers.ICCTemperatureManager.GetBoardOutTemperature (   self)

Gets driver output stage temperature.

◆ GetBoardOutTemperatureThreshold()

def optoICCSdk.registers.icc_registers.ICCTemperatureManager.GetBoardOutTemperatureThreshold (   self)

Gets driver output stage temperature threshold.

If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again

◆ SetBoardOutTemperatureThreshold()

  threshold = 0 
)

Sets driver output stage temperature threshold.

If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again

Gets driver power supply temperature threshold.

If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again

◆ SetBoardPowTemperatureThreshold()

def optoICCSdk.registers.icc_registers.ICCTemperatureManager.SetBoardPowTemperatureThreshold (   self,
  threshold = 0 
)

Sets driver power supply temperature threshold.

If this threshold is reached the output of the driver is disabled to cool down. Temperature has to fall by 10 degrees so that the output is enabled again
